questions.question: A critical section is shared among multiple processes. If two processes P1 and P2 arrive at the critical section at the same time, which process should be allowed to enter the critical section first?
questions.hint: Explain the reason behind your answer

questions.question: A process P is executing a critical section. At the same time, another process Q is waiting to enter the critical section. If P is released from the critical section before Q, what is the result?
What is the primary purpose of a mutex (mutual exclusion) lock in a process synchronization context?
questions.hint: Explain the concept of mutual exclusion
